x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Booking Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records a debit entry to reflect a decrease in funds or recognition of an obligation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Booking Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records a credit entry to reflect an increase in funds or recognition of an asset.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment Booking Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies previously booked entries to correct errors or update amounts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversal Booking Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that reverses a previously booked transaction, restoring prior balances.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Booking Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records the completion of a transaction or obligation, such as loan disbursement or payment settlement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Allocation Booking Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that books or assigns amounts to specific accounts, arrangements, or purposes.
